---
title: call-to-gc
description: "Discourage explicit garbage collection."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Discourage explicit garbage collection. Strider default: runtime.GC.

## Bad

```go
runtime.GC() // in normal application code
```

## Good

```go
buffer = nil // let Go collect it when appropriate
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only call-to-gc`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
